data: {"generalSituation":"A trough of low pressure will bring showers and a few squally thunderstorms to the coastal areas of Guangdong today and tomorrow. Showers will be heavy at times. The trough of low pressure is expected to linger over the coast of southern China early next week. The weather will remain unsettled. With the trough of low pressure weakening and the anticyclone aloft strengthening, showers will ease off gradually and the weather will improve over Guangdong midweek next week. It will be hot during the day.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260403","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"South to southeast force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers. Bright periods during the day.
